notes: 2 incompatible layouts; may belong to different programs (check linkage) or need manual unification

arbitration: deferred — Genuine structural conflict: variant 0 (cfl3d_to_tlns3d.F, tlns3d_to_cfl3d.F) starts with cltarg:real at offset 0, while variant 1 (readkey.F) starts with ialphit:integer at offset 0 — incompatible at every position. All three files are linked into the same executable (main.F calls sizer→readkey and splitter→cfl3d_to_tlns3d/tlns3d_to_cfl3d). Members rlxalph and dalpha appear only in readkey.F; resupdt, cltol, dcldal, alphalast, nttlast appear only in the other two. Cannot be resolved by renaming; requires manual source-level unification of the two layouts.
